title: EP 71| Gender Budgeting – International Perspectives| Policy Beyond Politics
description: 1. INTRODUCTION & RATIONALE This podcast examines whether fiscal systems, particularly tax structures, have mitigated or reinforced gender inequities over the past three decades.
